entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY INDEX
entities.description: An index calculated to assess soil quality and sustainability based on nutrient, microbial, and crop indices

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The state of the soil being assessed for sustainability and health

entities.name: FERTILIZER MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Different ways of applying nutrients to the soil to affect soil quality

entities.name: NUTRIENT INDEX
entities.description: An index reflecting the nutrient status of soil calculated from soil chemical parameters

entities.name: MICROBIAL INDEX
entities.description: An index calculated by determining soil microbial and biochemical activities

entities.name: CROP INDEX
entities.description: An index calculated by measuring crop yield parameters

entities.name: SOIL CHEMICAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: Measurements of soil chemistry used to calculate the nutrient index

entities.name: SOIL MICROBIAL AND BIOCHEMICAL ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Measurements of biological activity in soil used to calculate the microbial index

entities.name: CROP YIELD PARAMETERS
entities.description: Measurements of crop productivity used to calculate the crop index

entities.name: GREEN MANURE
entities.description: A source of organic nutrients used in the cropping system

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE
entities.description: A source of organic nutrients (FYM) used to increase soil sustainability

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: A source of synthetic nutrients that can negatively impact microbial and crop indices if used alone

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A crop used in the rotation system

entities.name: CORN
entities.description: A crop used in the rotation system

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A crop used in the rotation system

entities.name: RICE/CORN-WHEAT ROTATION
entities.description: A cropping system involving the rotation of rice, corn, and wheat

entities.name: ORGANIC MANURES
entities.description: Manures such as green manure and farmyard manure that increase the sustainability index

entities.name: NPK
entities.description: A specific chemical fertilizer treatment consisting of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium
